name: Wire Rope Assemblies
description: Custom wire rope assemblies for buyers who need defined lengths, fittings, coatings and drawing-based cable configurations.

name: Tool & Safety Lanyards
description: Coiled and straight safety lanyards for tool retention, equipment tethering and custom attachment requirements.

name: Suspension & Hanging Kits
description: Cable suspension kits for lighting, panels, signs and hanging systems with grippers, loops and adjustable fittings.

name: Control & Brake Cables
description: Bowden, push-pull, brake and throttle cable assemblies for equipment buyers who require controlled movement and fitted ends.

name: Gym Fitness Cables
description: PVC coated fitness equipment cables for weight stacks and training machines, supplied to drawing or sample requirements.

name: Wire Rope Fittings
description: Thimbles, sleeves, terminals, hooks, grippers and stops used with custom wire rope and cable assembly projects.
